daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are flowing through you like a smooth indie track. You're in your analytical era, but don't forget to let loose a little. Trust the quiet knowing you've got brewing underneath.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the effort you're putting into yourself, and honestly? It's attractive. Whether you're single or coupled up, today's about showing up as your most authentic self without overthinking it.
daily.career: Your eye for detail is unmatched rn. Channel that perfectionist energy into one project instead of spiraling across five. Quality over quantity always wins, and your vibe is magnetic today.
daily.health: Your body's asking for something grounding—maybe a walk, some stretching, or just sitting with a warm drink. Listen to what feels restorative rather than punishing. Rest is productive too.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about releasing what no longer serves you, Virgo. Mercury's vibes are encouraging you to trust your gut and lean into spontaneity. You're entering a phase of quiet transformation—nothing dramatic, just real growth happening behind the scenes.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your love language right now. For singles, someone intriguing might appear when you're not actively looking. Either way, authenticity over perfection is the move. Let them see the real you, messy thoughts and all.
weekly.career: Your creative problem-solving is unmatched this week. That project you've been overthinking? You're suddenly seeing it from a fresh angle. Trust your instincts even if they seem unconventional. Your unique approach is actually your superpower right now.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness, not intensity. Think restorative stretching, nourishing foods, and actual rest—not the hustle kind. Notice what activities genuinely energize you versus drain you. That clarity is worth more than any routine right now.
